generated_pair.question: What is the recommended way to make requests to the AWS Lambda API instead of calling it directly from an application?
generated_pair.answer: Using one of the AWS Software Development Kits (SDKs) for your programming language.

generated_pair.question: Which signature version does AWS Lambda support for authenticating requests?
supporting_sentences: If you don't use the AWS SDK, you will need to authenticate your request by providing a signature. AWS Lambda supports signature version 4.

generated_pair.question: What is one common cause of connection failures when using an AWS SDK?
generated_pair.answer: Changes to the certificates on the AWS servers.
supporting_sentences: Because AWS SDKs use the CA certificates from your computer, changes to the certificates on the AWS servers can cause connection failures when you attempt to use an SDK.

generated_pair.question: Where can you obtain root certificates from the first two authorities for AWS Lambda?
